utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: All right , I am gonna go steam my wedding dress okay ? Who wants the responsibility of making sure nothing happens to it ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I said I will do it !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Nobody wants to do it ? All right , I will do it myself .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Monica ! I am not gonna screw it up !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You are right , I am sorry .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Actually you were a big help tonight .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Yeah , and thanks for putting my grandmother in the cab and making sure she got to the hotel safely .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well of course that is what I am here for !
